draftDescription: This task is currently a draft. Head over to the <configTab>Agent Config</configTab> tab to review and customize the prompts before starting.
runningWarning: Running. CLI access may disrupt the workflow.
agentStoppedDesc: The agent stopped. You can retry automatically or debug manually in your terminal.
debugCliDesc: Resume in your terminal, fix the issue, then click "Read CLI Changes & Continue".
taskStuckDesc: No messages received. The agent may have crashed or timed out.
autoRetryDesc: The agent failed and is retrying automatically. You can cancel or force-retry from here.
interruptDesc: The agent will stop its current work and restart this stage with your instruction.
deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {id}? It will be moved to trash.
